meta.name: urban_crawl
meta.description: Generates a structured, exploratory campaign plan for a city, organizing content by district and thematic layer.

inputs.name: city_gazetteer
inputs.label: City Gazetteer
inputs.description: The source text containing detailed information about the city, its districts, key locations, factions, and points of interest.

outputs.name: urban_crawl_plan
outputs.label: Urban Crawl Plan
outputs.description: A comprehensive plan for the urban crawl, with detailed content organized for each city district.

fields.name: districts
fields.label: Districts
fields.description: A map of district names to their specific urban crawl content.

item_schema.name: district_plan
item_schema.label: District Plan
item_schema.description: The generated content for a single district.

fields.name: layers
fields.label: Content Layers
fields.description: A list of thematic layers of content within the district.

item_schema.name: layer
item_schema.label: Layer
item_schema.description: A single thematic layer with keyed content.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Layer Name
fields.description: The name of the thematic layer (e.g., 'Vampire Blood Den Activities').

fields.name: keyed_content
fields.label: Keyed Content Description
fields.description: A description of the scenes, scenarios, or activities tied to this layer.

fields.name: triggered_content
fields.label: Triggered Content
fields.description: Description of an event or scene that automatically triggers when players enter the district.

fields.name: investigation_procedure
fields.label: Investigation Procedure
fields.description: Specific rules for resolving investigation actions in this district.

fields.name: general_investigation
fields.label: General Investigation
fields.description: Procedure for randomly determining which layer's content is encountered on a general investigation.

fields.name: specific_layer_investigation
fields.label: Specific Layer Investigation
fields.description: Procedure for resolving content when a targeted layer is investigated.

fields.name: faction_impact
fields.label: Faction Impact
fields.description: Description of how the content in this district may affect the agendas and activities of various factions.
